text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: That running did not do the Mejiro name justice.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I put on a pitiful performance for all to see...
choice_data_list: Let's make up for it next time.
Then there's only one thing to do!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thank you for such reassuring words.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I shall redouble my efforts, so please join me in
the endeavor.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I must accept the truth and use this as a learning
experience. Ultimately, I've been granted an
opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Faltering here would bring dishonor to the Mejiro
name.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: So I will be tough and work hard. Go, go, me!
